name: Fairfield Bay Recreation
description: Fairfield Bay Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Fairfield Bay, AR. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water. You can’t reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $2 per person for 2 hours play

name: Stephens Court
description: Come play pickleball at Stephens Court in Bee Branch, AR! There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private. The facility includes amenities like lights. You can reserve the court.
fees: Private — Free but donations are accepted.
